concerns.text: T011-T013 (unit tests) appear BEFORE T014-T016 (implementation). Tests must validate existing code; semantic ordering requires implementation before tests. This violates producer-before-consumer flow.
T020 (test) and T026 (imputation tests) appear before their corresponding implementation tasks (T021-T025). Tests cannot run without the code they validate.
T027 (integration test) appears before T028-T032 (implementation). Integration tests require the full pipeline to be implemented first.
T035-T036 (validation tests) appear before T037-T038 (implementation). Tests must follow the code they validate.
T042 (logging test) appears before T043-T044 (implementation). Test cannot validate logging completeness before logging infrastructure is implemented.
T017, T024, T034, T040, T043 (logging tasks) depend on T004 (logging infrastructure). T004 must complete before any task that uses pipeline_logger.
T018 (weight config) should precede T016 (which reads configs/agency_weights.yaml). Config file must exist before consumer task runs.
T008 (data contracts) should precede T006-T007 (dataset acquisition/validation). Contracts define schema that validation tasks consume.
US4 (validation) must complete before US3 (regression) per T041 abort logic. Current ordering has US3 before US4, violating the dependency chain.
T028 (merge) depends on T016 (agency scores) and T021 (adherence metrics). Merge cannot run before both source datasets are produced.
T006 and T007 both access datasets/ directory. Marked [P] but may have hidden shared-state conflict if run in parallel.
T051 (performance optimization) depends on T029 (regression implementation). Optimization task should follow the code it optimizes.
